= 业余无线电台 BG7XTQ 的 QSL 卡收藏 =

----
*快速导航：*
[[#卫星线性转发器 QSL 卡|📡 卫星转发器]] |
[[#短波 AM 广播 QSL 卡|📻 短波广播]] |
[[#b100iaru|B100IARU]] |
[[#ba8afk|BA8AFK]] |
[[#bg7ruf|BG7RUF]] |
[[#diwata2|Diwata-2]] |
[[#haarp|haarp]] |
[[#dzrp|DZRP]] |
[[#rti|RTI]] |
[[#nhk|NHK]] |
[[#vorw|VORW]] |
[[#trsw|TRSW]] |
[[#saq|SAQ]] |
[[#bpm|BPM]] |
[[#xsg|XSG]]
----

== 卫星线性转发器 QSL 卡 ==

<div id="b100iaru"></div>
*B100IARU (2025-05-06) - Voice Repeater - SWL via PO-101 (Paper)*
[[http://www.crac.org.cn/News/Detail?ID=8b9f46aba3384686bbe24ee2e627ee5e|{{assets/images/2025-05-06_b100iaru.jpg}}]]
----
<div id="ba8afk"></div>
*BA8AFK (2025-11-09) - FM (paper)* (BA8AFK confirmed my SWL via SO-124)
{{assets/images/2025-11-09_ba8afk_2.jpg}}
{{assets/images/2025-11-09_ba8afk.jpg}}
----
<div id="bg7ruf"></div>
*BG7RUF (2026-02-09) - FM (digital)* (BG7RUF confirmed my QSO via SO-125)
{{assets/images/2026-02-09_bg7ruf_so-125.jpg}}
----
<div id="diwata2"></div>
*Diwata-2 (PO-101) (2025-05-06) - QSO as SWL (digital) [Time (UTC): 10:05:00AM (!)]*
[[https://db.satnogs.org/satellite/43678|{{assets/images/2025-05-06_diwata-2.jpg}}]]

== 短波 AM 广播 QSL 卡 ==

<div id="haarp"></div>
*HAARP (2025-11-21) - AM (paper)*
[[assets/images/2025-11-21_haarp.jpg|{{assets/images/2025-11-21_haarp.jpg}}]]
----
<div id="dzrp"></div>
*Radyo Pilipinas World Service (2025-12-01) - AM (digital)*
[[2025-12-02_Radyo_Pilipinas_World_Service.m4a|{{assets/images/2025-12-01_Radyo_Pilipinas_World_Service.jpg}}]]
----
<div id="rti"></div>
*RTI's German Service (2025-07-26) - AM (paper)*
[[https://www.rti.org.tw/de/information?uid=15&pid=731|{{assets/images/2025-07-26_RTI-DE.jpg}}]]
----
<div id="nhk"></div>
*NHK World-Japan (2025-03-02) - AM (paper)*
[[assets/images/2025-03-02_nhk_world-japan.jpg|{{assets/images/2025-03-02_nhk_world-japan.jpg}}]]
----
*NHK World-Japan (2025-03-11) - AM (paper)*
[[assets/images/2025-03-11_nhk_world-japan.jpg|{{assets/images/2025-03-11_nhk_world-japan.jpg}}]]
----
<div id="vorw"></div>
*VORW Radio International. (2025-12-04) - AM (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025-12-04_VORW.jpg}}
----
*VORW Radio International. (2025-11-13) - AM (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025-11-13_VORW.jpg}}
----
*VORW Radio International. (2025-11-06) - AM (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025-11-06_VORW.jpg}}
----
*Diwata-2 (PO-101) (2024-11-25) - FM (digital)*
(Philippine Space Agency confirmed my QSO with BG7QOA)

{{assets/images/2024-12-25_Diwata-2.jpg}}
----
<div id="trsw"></div>
*Texas Radio Shortwave (2025-10-31) - AM - Program: 2025 Texas Halloween Music (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025-10-31_TRSW_Halloween.jpg}}
----
*Texas Radio Shortwave (2025-10-08) - AM - Program: Music of B.J. Thomas (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025_10_08_TRSW.jpg}}
----
*Texas Radio Shortwave (2025-08-03) - AM - Program: Music of Bobby Fuller Four (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025_08_03_TRSW_Bobby_Fuller_Four.jpg}}
----
*Texas Radio Shortwave (2025-07-04) - AM - Program: Music of Albert Collins (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025_07_04_TRSW_Albert_Collins.jpg}}
----
*Texas Radio Shortwave (2025-06-06) - AM - Program: Music of Kris Kristofferson (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025_06_06_TRSW_Kris_Kristofferson.jpg}}
----
<div id="saq"></div>
*SAQ (2025-12-24) - CW - Christmas Eve Morning Transmission event (digital)*
{{assets/images/2025-12-24_saq.jpg}}
----
*SAQ (2025-10-24) - CW - UN-Day Oct 24th, 2025 Event (digital)*
[[https://alexander.n.se/en/saq-scheduled-to-air-on-un-day-oct-24th-2025/|{{assets/images/2025-10-24_saq.jpg}}]]
----
*SAQ 100 Year Anniversary Transmissions (2025-07-02) - CW (digital)*
[[https://alexander.n.se/celebrate-100-years-with-saq-grimeton/|{{assets/images/2025_07_02_saq.jpg}}]]
----
<div id="bpm"></div>
*BPM (2025-03-07) 15MHz - AM (paper)*
{{assets/images/2025_03_07_BPM.jpg}}
----
<div id="xsg"></div>
*XSG (2025-02-13) - CW - Special Event "120 Years of XSG: Special World Radio Day" (paper)*
{{assets/images/2025_02_13_XSG.jpg}}
